name: Vector Legal
long_description:
A modern solution for Startup legal: we are a premier, full service, hybrid AI law firm & legal tech platform. 

Customers get software + white glove lawyer support for maximum value on each legal matter.

Services: fundraise & priced rounds | customer contracts | complex formations | grow your team | agentic data rooms | e-signatures | cap table management | legal health checks | mergers & acquisitions | co-founder separations | dissolutions.
one_liner: Full service ai law firm & software solution, for startups
